testcase.name: 0001. SQL Injection in /api/users
testcase.failure:
Target: https://app.example.test CWE: CWE-89 CVSS: 9.8 OWASP: A03
UNION-based SQLi via id parameter.

testcase.name: 0002. Remote Code Execution in /upload
testcase.failure:
Target: https://app.example.test CWE: CWE-78 CVSS: 9.5
Unrestricted file upload + LFI chain.

testcase.name: 0003. Server-Side Request Forgery
testcase.failure:
Target: https://app.example.test CWE: CWE-918 CVSS: 8.1
Internal metadata endpoint reachable.

testcase.name: 0004. Reflected XSS in search
testcase.failure:
Target: https://app.example.test CWE: CWE-79 CVSS: 7.5 OWASP: A03
`q` echoed unescaped.

testcase.name: 0005. Outdated jQuery
testcase.failure:
Target: https://app.example.test CWE: CWE-1104 CVSS: 6.1
jQuery 1.x with known prototype-pollution.

testcase.name: 0006. Missing security headers
testcase.failure:
Target: https://app.example.test CWE: CWE-693
No CSP / HSTS / X-Frame-Options.

testcase.name: 0007. Cookie missing Secure flag
testcase.system-out:
[LOW] Cookie missing Secure flag Target: https://app.example.test
Session cookie served over HTTP.

testcase.name: 0008. Server banner exposed
testcase.system-out:
[LOW] Server banner exposed Target: https://app.example.test
Server header leaks nginx/1.18.0.

testcase.name: 0009. HTTP allowed alongside HTTPS
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] HTTP allowed alongside HTTPS Target: https://app.example.test
Plain HTTP returns 200 OK.

testcase.name: 0010. Open directory listing
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] Open directory listing Target: https://app.example.test
/static/ shows directory index.
